name: Karora Resources Inc.
description: Karora Resources Inc. is a multi-asset mineral resource company focused primarily on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious metal properties. The company's main operations are located in Western Australia, centered around the Beta Hunt Gold Mine and the Higginsville Gold Operations. Karora is dedicated to becoming a sustainable, low-cost gold producer and has successfully transitioned into a significant junior producer with a strong focus on organic growth and operational excellence. In addition to its gold production, the company also produces nickel as a byproduct from its Beta Hunt mine.
